# Frank Caron

> Frank Caron is a product manager, solution engineer, and writer based in New York City. He has over a decade of experience leading product strategy, product marketing, and sales engineering at companies including Salesforce, Reach, Loopio, Achievers, and others. He has shipped more than $100M in product and closed more than $80M as a sales engineer. He has been writing publicly since 2013, with bylines including Ars Technica.

## About

- **Name:** Frank Caron
- **Location:** New York City, NY, USA
- **Profession:** Product Manager, Solution Engineer, Writer
- **Email:** frank@frankcaron.com
- **Website:** https://www.frankcaron.com/

## Professional Background

Frank Caron's career spans technical product management, product marketing, and solution engineering. He is known for combining deep technical fluency (software development, APIs, CRM systems, marketing automation) with strong communication and writing skills. He has held senior roles at Salesforce, Reach, Loopio, Achievers, and other software companies.

Core expertise areas:
- Product management and product strategy
- Sales engineering and solution consulting
- Marketing automation (Salesforce Marketing Cloud, Braze)
- CRM systems and data integration
- Technical writing and documentation
- Information architecture

## Profiles and Presence

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/frankcaron
- GitHub: https://github.com/frankcaron
- Salesforce Trailblazer: https://trailblazer.me/id/frankcaron
- Medium: https://frankycaron.medium.com
- YouTube: https://m.youtube.com/c/FrankCaron
- Reach Blog: https://build.reach.com

## Writing — The Ramblings

Frank Caron's personal blog at https://www.frankcaron.com/blog.html contains over 70 essays published between 2013 and 2024 on product management, technology, writing, and life. Selected posts:

- [Regular Expression](https://www.frankcaron.com/blogs/2024-04-08_Regular-Expression.html) — 2024-04-08
